titleStmt.title: SII 25.158: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 158. (A.R. No. 158 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This fragmentary inscription commences with the praśasti, Pugaḻmāduviḷaṅga, etc., of the king.

The year of the record is lost. It gives the details of date viz., Regnal year, 40, Kaṉṉi śu 10, Monday, which may correspond to 1109 A.D., September 6, the tithi, however ended at �98 on the previous day.

It refers to the vyavasthai made by the sabhai of Tirunaṟaiyūr alias ••••• dēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻavaḷanāḍu which met once under the pipal tree called Rājanārāyaṇan and granted lands as iṟaiyili to the diety Siddhēśvara.
The nāḍu is said to have been administered by Rājēndraśōḻa-Brahmādhirājan. It refers to an announcement made by this officer. Other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ...— pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jeyamā
tu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malar makaḷ puṇara U
rimaiyil ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭimunavar nilai ke
ṭa villavar nilaitaraThe usual expression is kulaitarayenai manṉavar Iriyalluḻa
tara tikkaṉaittu tancakkara naṭātti virasiṅhāsanattu U
lakuṭaiyāḷḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirāja- kesaThe ends of the lines are built in.
na tribhuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻa devarkku yā
tuk kanṉi nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu daśamiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum
nāḷ kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrā
taviccaruppeti maṅkalattu māhāsabhaiyom Uṭaiyār sitthiśvara
lil muṉpil rājanārāyaṇan Araciṉ kiḻai Iṟṟai nāḷāl dharmmi ceytu
raivarak kūṭiyiruntu sabhāvyavasthai paṇṇiṉapaṭi nammur siddhiśva
varkku Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa nilattukku Iṟaiyilik kāna
innāṭṭu ceykiṟa rājentracoḻa brammādharājariṭai
rūpāy 4 10 tāvatu kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr
māteviccaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār
coḻa brahmādhirājan Aṟivitta(ā)vāṟu taṅkaḷur
Digital edition of SII 25.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
